title: Simulation: Monthly Money
perfectScoreMsg: You made {{score}} smart money decisions out of {{total}} scenarios! You're learning to manage money wisely!
lessonLabel: You understand the importance of saving, prioritizing needs over wants, and avoiding risky financial decisions!
lowScoreMsg: You made {{score}} smart money decisions out of {{total}} scenarios. Remember, saving money and making thoughtful financial decisions are important!
tipLabel: Try to choose the option that saves money and makes thoughtful financial decisions.

scenarios.title: Smart Allowance Allocation
scenarios.description: You get ₹500 monthly allowance. How should you manage it to balance fun and savings?

choices.text: Invest full amount in risky scheme

scenarios.title: Handling Unexpected Costs
scenarios.description: Your headphones break, repair costs ₹300. You have ₹200 saved. What’s the smart move?

choices.text: Use savings and earn remaining to cover cost

scenarios.title: Bonus Money Strategy
scenarios.description: You get ₹200 bonus for high grades. How should you use it?

choices.text: Spend everything on snacks and games
Lend it to friends for fun
Save most, use small portion for treat

scenarios.title: Part-Time Job Earnings
scenarios.description: You earn ₹1000 from part-time work. How can you use it wisely for the month?

choices.text: Spend all on lifestyle without plan

scenarios.title: Balancing Wants and Needs
scenarios.description: You want ₹800 shoes but need ₹500 textbooks. What’s the financially smart choice?

choices.text: Buy textbooks first, save or plan for shoes later
